As interactive Prime I mint packets with presented_to_user=true and transcript_captured=true by presenting full artifact content in chat. full_content:
{
  "id": "DCL-OLLAMA-AUTHOR-METADATA-INJECTION-001",
  "type": "design_constraint",
  "status": "specified",
  "title": "Ollama harness MUST inject author-metadata env vars before any Write tool dispatch",
  "scope": "GT-KB Ollama harness governed-write provenance. Affected by ADR-OLLAMA-HARNESS-ADOPTION-001 and GOV-FILE-BRIDGE-AUTHORITY-001.",
  "tags": ["design-constraint", "ollama", "author-metadata", "provenance", "phase-1"],
  "description": "Constraint: Inside scripts/ollama_harness.py, before invoking any Write/Edit/Bash tool dispatch on the local model's behalf (and before invoking the guard adapter for governed-document writes), the shim MUST set GTKB_AUTHOR_MODEL=<routed model id> and GTKB_AUTHOR_MODEL_VERSION=<model tag suffix> (and the Ollama harness identity metadata) in the subprocess environment. These env vars are consumed by scripts/bridge_author_metadata.py to populate Author/Model lines in any bridge file the local model writes.\n\nSeverity: blocking. A bridge file written without correct author-metadata env vars will fail the bridge-compliance-gate.\n\nEnforcement: the guard-adapter dispatch path (_dispatch_write / _dispatch_edit / _dispatch_bash -> invoke_guard_adapter) sets author/model metadata before mutation; missing values fail closed.\n\nAffected by: ADR-OLLAMA-HARNESS-ADOPTION-001, GOV-FILE-BRIDGE-AUTHORITY-001. Owner decision anchor: DELIB-20260663.",
  "assertions": [
    {"type": "grep", "file": "scripts/ollama_harness.py", "pattern": "GTKB_AUTHOR_MODEL", "description": "Shim sets GTKB_AUTHOR_MODEL before governed writes."},
    {"type": "grep", "file": "scripts/ollama_harness.py", "pattern": "GTKB_AUTHOR_MODEL_VERSION", "description": "Shim sets GTKB_AUTHOR_MODEL_VERSION before governed writes."},
    {"type": "grep", "file": "scripts/ollama_harness.py", "pattern": "invoke_guard_adapter", "description": "Author metadata is injected along the guard-adapter dispatch path."}
  ]
}
